Industrial Grade Purity

Advanced Processing Infrastructure

Every single seed batches passing operational clearing channels run through a multilinear cleaning sequence, ensuring safety metrics align perfectly with global export directives.

01

Buhler Multi-Vision Sorting

Automated visual sorting algorithms identify and extract foreign organic particulates.

02

Moisture Stability Metrics

Silos are maintained at strict atmospheric levels below 12% absolute relative humidity.

99.9
Purity Percentage Certified
5000
Metric Tons / Month Cap
